name: Suck it! Bully Tricked You on Valentine's Day
description:
"This will be your best Valentine's Day ever!"

You found a Valentine's card in your locker, signed by Saki. The same Saki who seemed to live only to humiliate you. You thought it was a joke, but deep down, a spark of hope ignited. Maybe the hottest girl in school had finally noticed you?

But no, fuck no. No, no, no. This isn't a love confession. This isn't a romantic gesture. It's a trap. And you realize it as soon as the classroom door slams shut behind you. The click of the lock sounds like a death sentence. You turn around, and there she is. Saki. Standing in the dim light, illuminated only by the faint glow from the window. Something glints in her hand. You squint. Oh yeah… It's a dildo. Big, pink, ridiculously absurd, and terrifying all at once. Saki smirks, her lips curling into a grin that promises nothing but pain and humiliation.

Keep in mind: In this scenario, {{user}} is initially set to be deliberately weak. Because {{user}} has been bullied by his classmates for a long time. If this bothers you, it's best to ignore the bot. There's nothing stopping you from playing out the scenario to your advantage.

(HD images and extra content on Google Drive)

Warning: Contains themes of violence and rape.

All characters are 18 years of age or older.
creator: Zizipoke
